scripts.compile-styles:prd: sass assets/scss/main.scss assets/css/main.css --no-source-map; sass assets/scss/main-rtl.scss assets/css/main-rtl.css --no-source-map
scripts.compile-styles: sass assets/scss/main.scss assets/css/main.css; sass assets/scss/main-rtl.scss assets/css/main-rtl.css
scripts.all: npm run build-scripts && npm run compile-styles
scripts.ci: npm ci && run all && npm run cleanup
